results.evidence: std::any::{Any, TypeId} used in src/model/context.rs:1; Box<dyn Any> in src/widget/list_box.rs:200; Rc<dyn Any> in context.rs:21
Vec used pervasively across the codebase (tga.rs, clip_rects.rs, em_rec.rs, panel/tree.rs, etc.)
C++ macro-based intrusive tree. Rust uses std::collections::HashMap (process.rs, linear.rs, pack.rs) and BTreeSet (image.rs). The macro layer is subsumed by Rust owned collection types.
Map wrapper over AVL macros. Rust stdlib HashMap/BTreeMap subsumes this. src uses HashMap (process.rs, linear.rs, pack.rs) for keyed maps; BTreeSet in image.rs.
std::collections::BTreeSet used directly: src/foundation/image.rs:1 `use std::collections::BTreeSet;`; image.rs:779 `let mut set = BTreeSet::new();`
No matches for ConfigModel or config_model in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/model/config_model.rs has non-trivial load(), save(), and load_or_install() methods using parse_rec/write_rec.
results.extension_needed: Round-trip load()/save() with a known emRec file, verifying field values survive serialization and deserialization.

results.evidence: Eagle Mode's concrete application-level config (look-and-feel, mouse speed, etc.). The Rust port has a generic ConfigModel<T> but CoreConfig is a separate app-layer singleton. From emCoreConfig.h.
UI panel for editing emCoreConfig settings — pure Eagle Mode application UI. No grep hit for CoreConfigPanel in src/. From emCoreConfigPanel.h.
std::rc::Weak used directly: src/model/context.rs:4 `use std::rc::{Rc, Weak};`; context.rs:40 `parent: Option<Weak<Context>>`; context.rs:41 `children: RefCell<Vec<Weak<Context>>>`

Cursor imported in tests/golden/test_panel.rs:18 but used only in get_cursor() method stubs — not in any golden-data-loading test function. Source src/input/cursor.rs defines Cursor enum with 19 variants and as_str().
results.extension_needed: Exercise get_cursor() returning specific Cursor variants from widgets under hover/interaction, comparing resolved cursor name against golden-recorded string.

results.evidence: Dialog appears in test_panel.rs only as a comment and a Button label string — no Dialog struct imported or instantiated in any golden test. Source src/widget/dialog.rs implements add_button(), finish(), layout, and paint.
results.extension_needed: Render a Dialog with Ok/Cancel buttons and compare painted output against C++ emDialog golden image.

results.evidence: No matches for ErrorPanel or error_panel in any golden test file. Source src/widget/error_panel.rs implements paint() with dark-red background and yellow text.
results.extension_needed: Render ErrorPanel with a known error message and compare red/yellow painted result against C++ emErrorPanel golden image.

results.evidence: No matches for FileDialog or file_dialog in any golden test file. Source src/widget/file_dialog.rs wraps Dialog + FileSelectionBox with mode-dependent validation logic.
results.extension_needed: Render FileDialog in Open mode and compare painted dialog against C++ emFileDialog golden image.

results.evidence: No matches for FilePanel or file_panel in any golden test file. Source src/widget/file_panel.rs implements VirtualFileState with loading/error state display.
results.extension_needed: Render FilePanel in each VirtualFileState variant (Waiting, Loading, Error) and compare painted status display against C++ emFilePanel golden images.

results.evidence: FileSelectionBoxStubPanel in test_panel.rs is an explicit stub (line 300: 'Stub for C++ emFileSelectionBox') — does not use real FileSelectionBox. No import of FileSelectionBox in golden tests. Source src/widget/file_selection_box.rs has full PanelBehavior with directory listing, multi-select, filters.
results.extension_needed: Render FileSelectionBox with a known directory listing and compare painted widget tree against C++ emFileSelectionBox golden image.

results.evidence: std::io and std::fs used directly: process.rs:3 `use std::io::{self, Read, Write};`; config_model.rs:70 `std::fs::read_to_string`; config_model.rs:83 `std::fs::create_dir_all`; file_model.rs:309 `std::fs::metadata`
Eagle Mode file-panel plugin interface for hooking custom file viewers into the file browser. Rust port has FilePanel as a base but the plugin registry is app-layer infrastructure. From emFpPlugin.h.
No matches for App from src/window/app.rs or window::app in any golden test file. Source implements full winit ApplicationHandler loop integrating GPU, scheduler, panel tree, and input dispatch.
results.extension_needed: Exercise App event-loop integration by simulating resumed/window_event/about_to_wait cycles, asserting scheduler + panel-tree state transitions.

results.evidence: C++ base class for layout groups with border and focus. Rust port has concrete LinearGroup (layout/linear.rs:479) and PackGroup (layout/pack.rs:163) as subtypes. The base emGroup is subsumed by framework layout infrastructure. From emGroup.h.

Eagle Mode's image-format I/O plugin system. Rust codebase has hand-written TGA loader (foundation/tga.rs) and Image type but no general image-file plugin system. No image crate in Cargo.toml. From emImageFile.h.
Queries Eagle Mode's installation paths (install dir, config dir, etc.). No dirs crate, no home_dir/config_dir/data_dir usage in src/. From emInstallInfo.h.
No matches for Job or scheduler::job in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/scheduler/job.rs has internal unit tests but no golden test exercises Job/JobQueue against golden data.
results.extension_needed: Exercise JobQueue priority ordering, state transitions, and signal firing against a golden-recorded sequence of state values.

results.evidence: C++ doubly-linked intrusive list. Rust uses Vec pervasively; src/model/rec_types.rs:19 notes 'single-threaded Rc/RefCell ownership model makes linked-list unnecessary'. Vec is the stdlib replacement.
Eagle Mode's inter-process communication layer for single-instance detection and cross-process signaling. No IPC, Unix socket, pipe, or mpsc usage in src/. From emMiniIpc.h.
Box used directly throughout: em_rec.rs:51 Box<RecValue>; rec_types.rs:23 Box<dyn Fn()>; list_box.rs:200 Box<dyn Any>. Box<T> is Rust's owning pointer equivalent.
No matches for PriSchedAgent or pri_sched_agent in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/scheduler/pri_sched_agent.rs has internal unit tests but no golden test verifies priority-scheduling arbitration.
results.extension_needed: Exercise PriSchedModel with multiple agents at different priorities, recording grant order against a golden-recorded sequence.

results.evidence: std::process used directly in src/foundation/process.rs:5 `use std::process::{Child, ChildStderr, ChildStdin, ChildStdout, Command, ExitStatus, Stdio};`. The Rust port wraps std::process::Command/Child.
std::rc::Rc used directly: resource_cache.rs:2 `use std::rc::Rc;`; context.rs:4 `use std::rc::{Rc, Weak};`. Rc<RefCell<T>> is the idiomatic Rust equivalent.
Manages background threads for expensive render jobs. No thread pool, rayon, or crossbeam in src/ or Cargo.toml. Project enforces single-threaded design (no Arc/Mutex). From emRenderThreadPool.h.
No matches for Screen or window::screen in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/window/screen.rs has internal unit tests for monitor_index_of_rect but no golden test verifies monitor geometry queries.
results.extension_needed: Exercise Screen::monitor_index_of_rect and get_dpi with a synthetic monitor set, comparing results against golden-recorded monitor geometry values.

results.evidence: No matches for Fixed or foundation::fixed in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/foundation/fixed.rs has internal unit tests for Fixed12 arithmetic but no golden test verifies fixed-point rasterization output.
results.extension_needed: Render anti-aliased primitives and compare pixel coverage against C++ fixed-point rasterization golden output to verify Fixed12 sub-pixel accuracy.

results.evidence: Extended standard utilities header (string ops, math helpers). Rust uses std directly: std::fmt (color.rs, tga.rs), std::str::FromStr (color.rs), std::collections (image.rs, process.rs), std::sync::atomic (foundation/mod.rs). All emStd2 functionality covered by Rust stdlib.
Rust String and &str used pervasively across all 36 files in src/ (210+ occurrences). em_rec.rs:6-8,47 shows String used for every string field.

Texture imported in test_panel.rs:27 and used in testpanel_root/testpanel_expanded to fill polygons with Texture::LinearGradient, Texture::RadialGradient, and Texture::Image. Both tests call load_compositor_golden() and compare_images() against C++ golden output.
std::thread used directly: src/foundation/process.rs:6 `use std::thread;`; process.rs:507 `thread::sleep(sleep_dur)`. Rust's std::thread covers emThread's basic thread-management API.

Capability maps to src/layout/raster.rs (RasterLayout/RasterGroup). RasterLayout imported in tests/golden/layout.rs:4 and tests/golden/test_panel.rs:20. Golden tests layout_raster_3col, layout_raster_2row, layout_raster_strict, layout_raster_pref_tall all use compare_rects() with golden data.
Creates and auto-deletes temporary files. No tempfile crate in Cargo.toml, no temp_dir/TempFile usage in src/. Only /tmp reference is a hardcoded test path. From emTmpFile.h.

Eagle Mode's built-in UI images (arrows, borders, icons). Rust port has src/widget/toolkit_images.rs with ToolkitImages struct using include_bytes! for TGA assets. Application/framework infrastructure, not stdlib replacement. From emToolkit.h.

Tunnel in test_panel.rs only as TunnelStubPanel comments (lines 259, 1334, 1338-1339) — explicit stub, does not use real Tunnel widget. Source src/widget/tunnel.rs has non-trivial tunnel geometry and concentric rounded-rectangle painting.
results.extension_needed: Render Tunnel widget at known depth and child tallness, compare concentric rounded-rectangle painted output against C++ emTunnel golden image.

results.evidence: No matches for ZuiWindow or zui_window in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/window/zui_window.rs implements wgpu surface management, tile cache, view, input dispatch, and fullscreen logic.
results.extension_needed: Exercise ZuiWindow render and resize paths with a headless wgpu surface, comparing rendered tile output against golden image.

results.evidence: No matches for StateSaver or state_saver in tests/golden/*.rs. Source src/window/state_saver.rs implements WindowGeometry as a Record with from_rec/to_rec serialization backed by ConfigModel.
